## Verification

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run test:p0`
- [ ] `npm run test:p3`
- [ ] `npm run check:package`
- [ ] New or changed rules include a caught example and a nearby valid example.
- [ ] User-facing behavior and documentation agree.
- [ ] No credentials, personal contact details, local paths, caches, or generated browser logs are included.

## Evidence

- [ ] New design approval includes a concrete `--reason` when the lock changed.
